meaning: n.苏格兰人[语]adj.苏格兰的,苏格兰人[语]的
examples: He spoke with a Scots accent.
She comes from an old Scots family.
There are things you can express in Scots that you can't say in English.
In the 2001 census, about 42% of Scots identified themselves as Church of Scotland by religion.
And the Scots have decided that they're not going to allow cigarettes to be sold openly any more.
